title: PwShGUI-Checklists.xhtml (~README.md) — Agents tab never renders: hash nav broken, no showTab hook, status label stuck at 'Loading...'
description:
Three independent bugs cause the Agents tab in ~README.md/PwShGUI-Checklists.xhtml to appear blank:

1. HASH NAV: The IIFE at page bottom resolves window.location.hash (e.g. '#Agents') to a DOM element by exact ID only. The Agents tab element has id='agents-tab' but the URL uses '#Agents' or '#agents', so document.getElementById() returns null and showTab() is never called. Hash never activates the correct tab.

2. SHOWTAB HOOK MISSING: showTab() switches tab visibility but has no dispatch for id='agents-tab'. By contrast, items2do/bugs2fix call loadAllItems() and auto-pipeline calls loadPipeline() on first view. Agents tab had no equivalent hook — it relied solely on the page-load loadAgentRegistry() call which fires before the browser has fully parsed the DOM in some contexts, or returns empty on file:// protocol XHR failures without retry.

3. STATUS LABEL STUCK: renderAgentTable() skipped the status label update if textContent matched /[Rr]efreshing|[Ll]oading/. The initialization call sets the label to 'Loading...' and since XHR is async, renderAgentTable() runs while the label still reads 'Loading...' — the guard then prevents the final count from ever being written.
reported_by: User (#Agents tab never loading agent registry)
resolution:
1) Hash nav IIFE now tries raw hash, lowercase, and lowercase+'-tab' suffix so '#Agents', '#agents', '#agents-tab' all resolve to the agents-tab div and call showTab() correctly.
2) showTab() now has an 'agents-tab' branch: if data was never loaded, calls loadAgentRegistry(); otherwise calls renderAgentTable() to re-render with current filters.
3) Status label guard changed from /[Rr]efreshing|[Ll]oading/ to /[Rr]efreshing/ only — renderAgentTable() always writes the final count and turns the label green on success.
detection_method: User-reported: Agents tab shows no content. Code review of showTab(), hash IIFE, and renderAgentTable() confirmed all three defects. JSON data files (agent_registry.json, agentic-manifest.json, agent-call-stats.json) confirmed to exist on disk.
root_cause: Hash nav used exact-ID match only; showTab lacked an agents-tab handler; status label guard was too broad, blocking the final update when XHR completed normally.

remedy_tracking.notes: Fixed in session 2026-04-13. Three independent JS defects corrected.
